injuries.comment: Gostisbehere did not play on Thursday's (Jan. 1) game against Montreal.
Kiviranta will join the Avalanche on their upcoming road trip, which begins on Saturday (Jan. 3) versus the Hurricanes, as per Corey Masisak of The Denver Post.
Brindley is day-to-day, and he'll travel with the Avalanche to Carolina ahead of Saturday's (Jan. 3) game against the Hurricanes, as per Corey Masisak of The Denver Post.
